question: I was thinking about rearranging the furniture in my bedroom this weekend. Any tips?
ground_truth_answer: The user would prefer responses that take into account their existing plans to replace the bedroom dresser and their interest in mid-century modern style, suggesting furniture layouts that accommodate the new dresser and incorporate elements of this design aesthetic.
